name: techathon2026-clueless-folks
description: Office Watch — live lights/fans dashboard + Discord bot (Techathon Nationals 2026 preliminary submission, team Clueless_Folks)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix dashboard && npm install --prefix bot
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,dashboard,bot -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix bot"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix dashboard && npm run typecheck --prefix bot
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix dashboard && npm run build --prefix bot
